chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.S- 153 of 2022 Crl. Bail Application No.S- 197 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Bail Application 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of bail application 07-08-2023 Mr. Muhammad Ali Napar, Advocate for applicant in Crl.B.A.No.S-197 of 2022. Syed Israr Ali Shah, Advocate for applicant in Crl. B.A.No.S-153 of 2022. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional P.G for the State. ***** After arguing the matters at some length, learned counsel for the applicants do not press these bail applications and request for directions to the trial Court to conclude the trial within a certain period. This proposal has not been opposed by learned Additional P.G for the State. Accordingly, these bail applications are dismissed as not pressed. However, the trial Court is directed to examine the remaining two witnesses viz. Medico Legal Officer and I.O within a period of one and half months and then conclude the trial and submit report to this Court through its Additional Registrar. However, in case after such period, the applicants would be at liberty to move fresh bail applications before the trial Court, which if filed, shall be decided on their own merits. Office to place a signed copy of this order in captioned in connected matter. JUDGE Ahmad

Office to place a signed copy of this order in captioned in connected matter. JUDGE Ahmad Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.S- 126 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of B.A 1.For orders on office objections 2.For orders on MA 1273/2023 3.For hearing of Bail Application 05-06-2023 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for the applicant. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional P.G for the State. ***** None present for the complainant. As an indulgence, matter is adjourned to 15.06.2023. Office to issue intimation notice to complainant’s counsel for the next date of hearing. JUDGE Ahmad

Office to issue intimation notice to complainant’s counsel for the next date of hearing. JUDGE Ahmad Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.S- 434 of 2022 Crl. Bail Application No.S- 466 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of B.A For hearing of Bail Application 05-06-2023 Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for the applicants in both matters. Mr. Ubedullah Ghoto, Advocate for the complainant. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional P.G for the State. ***** Applicants are present on interim pre-arrest bail. Mr. Bozdar files some documents under the cover of statement and submits that complainant has not been attending the trial Court. On the other hand, learned counsel for the complainant seeks sometime to prepare his brief. Time is granted. Adjourned to 04.07.2023. Office to place a signed copy of this order in the captioned connected matter. JUDGE Ahmad

Office to place a signed copy of this order in the captioned connected matter. JUDGE Ahmad Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.S- 328 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of B.A For hearing of Bail Application 05-06-2023 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for the applicant. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional P.G for the State. ***** Applicant is present on interim pre-arrest bail. Repeat notice upon the complainant. Adjourned to 04.07.2023. JUDGE Ahmad

Adjourned to 04.07.2023. JUDGE Ahmad Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.S- 493 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of B.A For hearing of Bail Application 05-06-2023 Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for the applicants. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional P.G for the State. ***** All applicants are present on interim pre-arrest bail except applicant Noor Hassan alias Hasno, who is called absent said to be unwell. Absence of said applicant is condoned for today. Syed Naimat Ali Shah, Advocate holding brief on behalf of Mr. Shafique Ali Leghari, counsel for the complainant, requests for adjournment on the ground that latter is busy before another Bench of this Court. Adjourned to 10.07.2023. JUDGE Ahmad

Adjourned to 10.07.2023. JUDGE Ahmad Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.S- 308 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of B.A For hearing of Bail Application 05-06-2023 Mr. Shahid Ali K. Memon, Advocate for the applicant. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional P.G for the State. ***** Applicant is present on interim pre-arrest bail. Repeat notice upon the complainant. Adjourned to 26.06.2023. JUDGE Ahmad

Adjourned to 26.06.2023. JUDGE Ahmad Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.S- 309 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of B.A 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of Bail Application 05-06-2023 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional P.G for the State. ***** Applicant is present on interim pre-arrest bail. Mr. Danish Ali Bhatti, Advocate holding brief on behalf of Mr. Muhammad Ali Napar, counsel for the applicant requests for adjournment on the ground that latter is unwell today. Complainant Ghulam Farooq is also present and requests for time, as he intends to engage a counsel. Adjourned to 10.07.2023. JUDGE Ahmad

Adjourned to 10.07.2023. JUDGE Ahmad Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.S- 92 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of B.A 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For orders on MA 928/2023 3.For hearing of Bail Application 05-06-2023 Mr. Rukhsar Ahmed M. Junejo, Advocate for the applicant. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional P.G for the State. ***** Complainant Muhammad Iqbal present in person requests for adjournment, as his counsel is unavailable today. Certified copy of Challan filed by learned counsel for the applicant under the cover of his statement is taken on record and copy whereof is provided to learned APG. Adjourned to 19.06.2023. JUDGE Ahmad

Adjourned to 19.06.2023. JUDGE Ahmad Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.S- 195 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of B.A 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of Bail Application 05-06-2023 Syed Imtiaz Ahmed Shah Jilani, Advocate for the applicant. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional P.G for the State. ***** Repeat notice upon the complainant to be served through SHO within whose jurisdiction he resides. Office to ensure service report is filed before the next date of hearing. Adjourned to 12.06.2023. JUDGE Ahmad

Adjourned to 12.06.2023. JUDGE Ahmad Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.S- 207 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of B.A 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of Bail Application 05-06-2023 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for the applicant. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional P.G for the State. ***** Mr. Bilal Ahmed Soomro, Advocate files power on behalf of complainant, which is taken on record. He seeks time for preparation. Time is granted. Adjourned to 19.06.2023. JUDGE Ahmad

Adjourned to 19.06.2023. JUDGE Ahmad Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.S- 210 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of B.A 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of Bail Application 05-06-2023 Mr. Deedar Ali M.Chohan, Advocate for the applicant. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional P.G for the State. ***** Repeat notice upon the complainant to be served through SHO within whose jurisdiction he resides. Office to ensure service report is filed before the next date of hearing. Adjourned to 15.06.2023. JUDGE Ahmad

Adjourned to 15.06.2023. JUDGE Ahmad Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.S- 226 of 2023 Crl. Bail Application No.S- 227 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of B.A 1.For orders on MA 3123/2023 2.For orders on office objections. 3.For hearing of Bail Application 05-06-2023 Mr. Irshad Hussain Dahrejo, Advocate for applicants in both matters. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional P.G for the State. ***** Repeat notice upon the complainant to be served through SHO within whose jurisdiction he resides. Office to ensure service report is filed before the next date of hearing. Mr. Dharejo submits that two another Crl. Bail Applications No.S- 169 and 170 of 2023, which arise from the same FIR, are also pending adjudication before this Court; therefore, he requests that all Bail Applications be heard together. Request made by Mr. Dharejo is justifiable one. Let office to fix both Bail Applications along with listed Bail Applications before the same Bench. Adjourned to 12.06.2023. Office to place a signed copy of this order in the captioned connected matter. JUDGE Ahmad
